message:
feat(component): Implement crypto interface wrapper

Phase 5: Crypto Interface - Steps 2

Add Value enum variants for crypto:
- ok_list_u8 for result<list<u8>, E>
- list_string for list<string>
- Helper methods: asOkListU8(), asListString()

Implement crypto_impl.zig (~210 lines):
- hash() wrapper for sha256/384/512/sha1/md5
- hmac() wrapper for sha256/384/512 (md5/sha1 rejected)
- random-bytes() with 100MB safety limit
- get-hash-algorithms() returning list of supported algorithms
- Helper hexEncode() for converting bytes to hex strings
- Follows filesystem_impl.zig pattern

Crypto operations use std.crypto:
- Hashing: crypto.hash.sha2.*, crypto.hash.Sha1, crypto.hash.Md5
- HMAC: crypto.auth.hmac.sha2.*
- Random: crypto.random.bytes()

All functions return proper result<T, crypto-error> values.
